---
title: "Télémétrie & Monitoring"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Télémétrie & Monitoring

## Métriques clés

| Catégorie | Métrique | Description | Outil |
|-----------|----------|-------------|-------|
| **Latence** | TTFT (Time To First Token) | Temps avant premier token | OpenTelemetry |
| | Total latency | Temps total requête | OpenTelemetry |
| | Tool execution time | Temps d'exécution d'un tool | Custom tracing |
| **Qualité** | Hallucination rate | % de réponses hallucinées | Eval pipeline |
| | Tool call accuracy | % d'appels corrects | Schema validation |
| | Task completion rate | % de tâches réussies | Custom metrics |
| **Coût** | Tokens per request | Tokens consommés | LiteLLM, custom |
| | Cost per task | $ par tâche accomplie | Cost tracking |
| | Cost per user | $ par utilisateur | Cost tracking |
| **Usage** | Requests per minute | Volume de requêtes | Rate limiter |
| | Active agents | Agents simultanés | Dashboard |
| | Tool usage frequency | Tools les plus utilisés | Analytics |

## Stack de monitoring

```{mermaid}
graph TB
    AGENT[Agent IA] -->|spans| OTEL[OpenTelemetry SDK]
    OTEL -->|export| COLLECTOR[OTel Collector]
    COLLECTOR -->|traces| JAEGER[Jaeger / Tempo]
    COLLECTOR -->|metrics| PROM[Prometheus]
    COLLECTOR -->|logs| LOKI[Loki / ELK]
    PROM --> GRAF[Grafana Dashboard]
    LOKI --> GRAF
    JAEGER --> GRAF
    
    style OTEL fill:#1565c0,color:#fff
    style GRAF fill:#1b5e20,color:#fff
```

## OpenTelemetry pour agents IA

```python
from opentelemetry import trace
from opentelemetry.sdk.trace import TracerProvider

tracer = trace.get_tracer(__name__)

@tracer.start_as_current_span("agent.task")
async def execute_task(task: str):
    span = trace.get_current_span()
    span.set_attribute("agent.id", "agent-001")
    span.set_attribute("agent.model", "claude-sonnet-4")
    span.set_attribute("agent.task", task)
    
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("llm.call") as llm_span:
        llm_span.set_attribute("llm.tokens_in", 1500)
        llm_span.set_attribute("llm.tokens_out", 300)
        llm_span.set_attribute("llm.cost_usd", 0.0023)
        # ... LLM call ...
    
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("tool.filesystem") as tool_span:
        tool_span.set_attribute("tool.name", "filesystem.read")
        tool_span.set_attribute("tool.success", True)
        # ... tool execution ...
```

## Alerting

| Alerte | Condition | Sévérité |
|--------|-----------|----------|
| Cost spike | Cost > 2× average hourly | Warning |
| Cost budget | Cost > 80% monthly budget | Critical |
| Error rate | Error rate > 5% over 5 min | Warning |
| Error rate | Error rate > 15% over 5 min | Critical |
| Latency | TTFT > 5s | Warning |
| Hallucination | Hallucination rate > 10% | Critical |
| Rate limit | 429 errors > 10/min | Warning |
| Sandbox escape | Unauthorized access attempt | Critical |

## Dashboards recommandés

| Dashboard | Panels clés |
|-----------|-------------|
| **Overview** | Requests/min, active agents, cost/hour, error rate |
| **Latency** | TTFT p50/p95/p99, total latency, tool execution time |
| **Cost** | Cost by model, cost by user, cost by project, daily trend |
| **Quality** | Hallucination rate, task completion, tool accuracy |
| **Security** | Failed auth, sandbox events, data access logs |
